headline: Comcast Corporation and Comcast Cable Communications, LLC Commence Offers to Purchase for Cash Certain of their Outstanding Senior Debt Securities
summary: PHILADELPHIA, May 27, 2026--Comcast Corporation, a Pennsylvania corporation (the "Company") today announced that it has commenced cash tender offers to purchase any and all of its outstanding 2.350% Notes due 2027; 3.300% Notes due February 2027; 3.300% Notes due April 2027; 4.150% Notes due 2028; 3.150% Notes due 2028; 3.550% Notes due 2028; 5.100% Notes due 2029; 4.550% Notes due 2029; 4.250% Notes due 2030; 3.400% Notes due 2030 and 2.650% Notes due 2030 (together, the "Company Notes") (colle

headline: Comcast Business Delivers Advanced Technology Infrastructure at Levi’s® Stadium, Powering the Fan Experience and Stadium Operations
summary: PHILADELPHIA, May 27, 2026--Comcast Business today detailed the advanced network infrastructure it has deployed at Levi’s® Stadium, home of the San Francisco 49ers – one of the most technologically-enabled venues in professional sports. The network underpins the high-performance connectivity required for immersive fan experiences, seamless operations, and large-scale live event production.

headline: Comcast Expands Hagerstown Network And Tests Broadband Growth Story
summary: Comcast (NasdaqGS:CMCSA) plans to expand its network in the Hagerstown, Maryland area. The build targets connectivity for more than 50,000 additional homes and businesses. The project includes collaboration with local small businesses, such as Bella’s Bites. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:CMCSA, this Hagerstown buildout adds a fresh data point to Comcast’s connectivity story beyond its rural Florida projects. The focus on both residential and business customers, alongside partnerships with...
